form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 11 months. Finished off last preparation won by 0.3 len this track May 6 over 1000m defeating Felina Dollar carrying 58kg at $2.60. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 2 len this track January 6 2025 over 1000m defeating Fany Koller with 57kg at $2.80. Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 12 at this track in the G3 Riboletta on March 8 over 1200m, 21 len behind Orange Blossom with 59kg at $18.20. The run before that won by 1.3 len at this track February 24 over 1000m in the wet defeating Desir Infini carrying 58kg at $7.90. Can do a lot better than that last run.
